requirement_topic.zh: 机械基础与电气安全边界
requirement_topic.zht: 機械基礎與電氣安全邊界

summary.en: Turkey-facing power tools are handled through a CE-aligned machinery route where EN 62841 is used as the technical safety path and TSE TS EN references are used for local standard alignment. The tool body is treated under machinery safety logic, while chargers, inverters, and external power supplies are assessed separately under LVD-like constraints where voltage and current limits place them in scope, and file-level evidence must reflect Turkey's 230/400 V system.
summary.zh: 面向土耳其的电动工具按CE对齐机械路径处理，EN 62841用于技术安全路径，TSE TS EN参考用于本地标准对齐。工具本体按机械安全逻辑处理，而充电器、逆变器和外置电源则在电压电流范围内单独按LVD类约束审查，文件证据需体现土耳其230/400V系统条件。
summary.zht: 面向土耳其的電動工具按CE對齊機械路徑處理，EN 62841用於技術安全路徑，TSE TS EN參考用於本地標準對齊。工具本體按機械安全邏輯處理，而充電器、逆變器和外置電源則在電壓電流範圍內單獨按LVD類約束審查，文件證據需體現土耳其230/400V系統條件。

standards_or_laws: Machinery Directive 2006/42/EC machinery essentials and transition context under Regulation (EU) 2023/1230
Directive 2014/35/EU (LVD principles) for in-scope electrical components
EN 62841 harmonised family as technical conformity route

summary.en: Chinese export files usually rely on GB 3883.1-series safety reports and related GB/T accessory or charger requirements as domestic baseline. These are useful engineering inputs but do not complete Turkey-facing electrical-boundary treatment by themselves.
summary.zh: 中国出口文件通常以GB 3883.1系列安全报告和相关GB/T附件或充电器要求作为国内基线，这些可用于工程判断，但不能单独完成土耳其方向的电气边界完整处理。
summary.zht: 中國出口文件通常以GB 3883.1系列安全報告和相關GB/T附件或充電器要求作為國內基線，這些可用於工程判斷，但不能單獨完成土耳其方向的電氣邊界完整處理。

standards_or_laws: Relevant GB/T safety and accessory standards

gap.en: A frequent exporter gap is reporting only a bare tool test without explicit scope split for charger and adapter variants, while Turkey-facing acceptance requires clear in-scope definitions at the system level and voltage-specific assumptions for 230/400 V 50 Hz applications.
gap.zh: 出口常见差距是只报告裸机测试而未明确拆分充电器和适配器变体，而土耳其接受层面要求系统级的范围划分和230/400V 50Hz应用条件。
gap.zht: 出口常見差距是只報告裸機測試而未明確拆分充電器和適配器變體，而土耳其接受層面要求系統級的範圍劃分和230/400V 50Hz應用條件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation is machinery conformity for in-scope power tools and electrical conformity logic for connected in-scope accessories; EN 62841 remains a voluntary harmonised technical route.
mandatory_status.cn: 中国GB 3883等是中国境内通行的技术基线，但不能单独满足土耳其市场对接条件。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Not Turkey-ready until electricity scope and model-level split between tool body and power components is explicit in the Turkey-facing file and linked to 230/400 V operating assumptions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在土耳其方向文件中未明确工具本体与电源组件的型号级范围拆分并关联230/400V运行假设前，不应视为土耳其就绪。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在土耳其方向文件中未明確工具本體與電源元件的型號級範圍拆分並關聯230/400V運行假設前，不應視為土耳其就緒。
